WITH distinct_purchases AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id, purchase_date
    FROM purchase
),
with_month_num AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        purchase_date,
        (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(purchase_date || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')) * 12 
         + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(purchase_date || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS month_num
    FROM distinct_purchases
),
with_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        purchase_date,
        month_num,
        month_num - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY month_num) AS grp
    FROM with_month_num
),
streak_lengths AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        grp,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM with_groups
    GROUP BY user_id, grp
),
longest_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        MAX(streak_length) AS longest_streak
    FROM streak_lengths
    GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT 
    longest_streak AS streak_length,
    COUNT(*) AS num_users
FROM longest_streaks
GROUP BY longest_streak
ORDER BY longest_streak DESC

SELECT
    base_cls.relname AS base_table,
    base_att.attname AS base_col,
    ref_cls.relname AS referencing_table,
    ref_att.attname AS referencing_col,
    'CONSTRAINT ' || c.conname || ' ' || pg_get_constraintdef(c.oid) AS constraint_sql
FROM pg_constraint c
JOIN pg_class base_cls ON base_cls.oid = c.confrelid
JOIN pg_class ref_cls ON ref_cls.oid = c.conrelid
CROSS JOIN LATERAL UNNEST(c.conkey, c.confkey) AS u(conkey_num, confkey_num)
JOIN pg_attribute ref_att ON ref_att.attrelid = c.conrelid AND ref_att.attnum = u.conkey_num
JOIN pg_attribute base_att ON base_att.attrelid = c.confrelid AND base_att.attnum = u.confkey_num
WHERE c.contype = 'f'
  AND c.confrelid = (SELECT oid FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'users')
  AND c.confrelid != c.conrelid
ORDER BY ref_cls.relname, ref_att.attname

WITH ordered_missions AS (
    SELECT 
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        CASE 
            WHEN mission_start = LAG(mission_end) OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start, mission_end)
            THEN 0
            ELSE 1
        END AS is_new_span
    FROM superhero_missions
),
span_groups AS (
    SELECT
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        SUM(is_new_span) OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start, mission_end) AS span_id
    FROM ordered_missions
)
SELECT
    hero_id,
    MIN(mission_start) AS mission_start,
    MAX(mission_end) AS mission_end
FROM span_groups
GROUP BY hero_id, span_id
ORDER BY hero_id, mission_start

WITH prioritized AS (
  SELECT
    account.account_id,
    account.frequency,
    l.loan_id,
    l.date AS loan_date,
    account.date AS account_date,
    CASE
      WHEN l.date >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours') THEN 0
      ELSE 1
    END AS priority,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY account.account_id
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN l.date >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        l.date DESC NULLS LAST
    ) AS rn
  FROM account
  LEFT JOIN loan l
    ON account.account_id = l.account_id
  WHERE account.district_id = 18
),
unique_accounts AS (
  SELECT
    account_id,
    frequency,
    loan_id,
    loan_date,
    account_date,
    priority,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY priority
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN priority = 0 THEN loan_date END DESC NULLS LAST,
        CASE WHEN priority = 1 THEN account_date END DESC NULLS LAST
    ) AS pos
  FROM prioritized
  WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT
  account_id,
  frequency,
  loan_id,
  loan_date,
  priority
FROM unique_accounts
WHERE NOT (priority = 1 AND account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id FROM unique_accounts WHERE priority = 0 AND pos <= 6
  ))
  AND NOT (priority = 0 AND pos > 6)
ORDER BY priority, pos

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION f_gap_fill_update(tbl text, id text, row_num text)
RETURNS void
LANGUAGE plpgsql AS
$func$
DECLARE
    cols text[];
    col  text;
    sql_stmt text;
BEGIN
    -- Get all nullable columns except the id and row_num columns
    SELECT array_agg(column_name::text)
    INTO cols
    FROM information_schema.columns c
    WHERE c.table_name = tbl
      AND c.is_nullable = 'YES'
      AND c.column_name NOT IN (id, row_num);

    IF cols IS NULL THEN
        RETURN;
    END IF;

    FOREACH col IN ARRAY cols
    LOOP
        sql_stmt := format(
            'UPDATE %1$I AS t
             SET %2$I = sub.filled_val
             FROM (
                 SELECT ctid AS rid,
                        COALESCE(
                            %2$I,
                            LAG(%2$I) IGNORE NULLS OVER w
                        ) AS filled_val
                 FROM %1$I
                 WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY %3$I ORDER BY %4$I)
             ) sub
             WHERE t.ctid = sub.rid
               AND t.%2$I IS NULL
               AND sub.filled_val IS NOT NULL',
            tbl, col, id, row_num
        );

        -- Try IGNORE NULLS syntax first; if not supported, fall back to subquery approach
        BEGIN
            EXECUTE sql_stmt;
        EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
            sql_stmt := format(
                'UPDATE %1$I AS t
                 SET %2$I = sub.filled_val
                 FROM (
                     SELECT ctid AS rid,
                            COALESCE(
                                %2$I,
                                (SELECT s2.%2$I
                                 FROM %1$I s2
                                 WHERE s2.%3$I = s1.%3$I
                                   AND s2.%4$I <= s1.%4$I
                                   AND s2.%2$I IS NOT NULL
                                 ORDER BY s2.%4$I DESC
                                 LIMIT 1)
                            ) AS filled_val
                     FROM %1$I s1
                 ) sub
                 WHERE t.ctid = sub.rid
                   AND t.%2$I IS NULL
                   AND sub.filled_val IS NOT NULL',
                tbl, col, id, row_num
            );
            EXECUTE sql_stmt;
        END;
    END LOOP;
END
$func$

WITH last_per_station AS (
  -- Last transaction at each gas station per customer
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      *,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY customerid, gasstationid
        ORDER BY date DESC, time DESC, transactionid DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM transactions_1k
  ) sub
  WHERE rn = 1
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    -- Flag whether this customer has any issue (amount < 10) among last-per-station txns
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END)
      OVER (PARTITION BY customerid) AS has_issue,
    -- Rank issue transactions: first chronologically
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY customerid,
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
        date ASC, time ASC, transactionid ASC
    ) AS issue_rank,
    -- Rank non-issue transactions: last chronologically
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY customerid,
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
      ORDER BY
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END,
        date DESC, time DESC, transactionid DESC
    ) AS no_issue_rank
  FROM last_per_station
)
SELECT
  customerid,
  transactionid,
  gasstationid,
  amount
FROM ranked
WHERE
  -- Customer has an issue: pick the first station where amount < 10
  (has_issue = 1 AND amount < 10 AND issue_rank = 1)
  OR
  -- Customer has no issue: pick the last station where amount >= 10
  (has_issue IS NULL AND amount >= 10 AND no_issue_rank = 1)
ORDER BY customerid

WITH grouped AS (
    SELECT
        m.id,
        m.date,
        m.home_team_goal,
        m.away_team_goal,
        CASE WHEN m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_draw,
        m.home_team_goal + m.away_team_goal AS total_goals,
        SUM(CASE WHEN m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
            OVER (ORDER BY m.id, m.date) AS draw_group
    FROM match AS m
),
adjusted AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        date,
        is_draw,
        total_goals,
        -- Non-draw rows belong to the group of the next draw, so shift group:
        -- draw rows keep their draw_group, non-draw rows get draw_group + 1
        -- Actually: group non-draws with the NEXT draw by using lead-like grouping
        draw_group,
        -- For a draw row, we want sum of non-draw total_goals where draw_group = current draw_group - 1 (between previous draw and this draw)
        -- Use: non-draw rows have the same draw_group as the preceding draw. So for draw with draw_group=N, sum non-draws with draw_group=N-1... no wait, non-draws after draw N-1 have draw_group=N-1.
        -- So for draw N, sum of non-draw goals where draw_group = N - 1
        -- But also we can just sum non-draw goals within same draw_group for the next draw.
        CASE WHEN is_draw = 0 THEN total_goals ELSE 0 END AS non_draw_goals
    FROM grouped
)
SELECT
    g.id,
    g.date,
    1 AS invoiced,
    COALESCE(sub.accumulated_goals, 0) AS amount
FROM grouped g
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        draw_group,
        SUM(total_goals) AS accumulated_goals
    FROM grouped
    WHERE is_draw = 0
    GROUP BY draw_group
) sub ON sub.draw_group = g.draw_group - 1
WHERE g.is_draw = 1
ORDER BY g.id, g.date

WITH qr1(item, subgroup) AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup1 FROM superhero_group WHERE subgroup1 IS NOT NULL
),
qr2(item, subgroup) AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup2 FROM superhero_group WHERE subgroup2 IS NOT NULL AND subgroup2 != 'nan'
),
-- Combine all items with their subgroup labels (prefixed to distinguish)
combined AS (
    SELECT item, 'sg1_' || subgroup AS sg FROM qr1
    UNION
    SELECT item, 'sg2_' || subgroup AS sg FROM qr2
),
-- Build edges between subgroups that share at least one item
sg_edges AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.sg AS sg_a, b.sg AS sg_b
    FROM combined a
    JOIN combined b ON a.item = b.item AND a.sg <> b.sg
),
-- Get all distinct subgroups
all_sgs AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT sg FROM combined
),
-- Recursive CTE to find connected components: for each subgroup, find the minimum reachable subgroup
reach AS (
    SELECT sg, sg AS reachable FROM all_sgs
    UNION
    SELECT r.sg, e.sg_b AS reachable
    FROM reach r
    JOIN sg_edges e ON r.reachable = e.sg_a
),
-- Assign each subgroup its component = minimum reachable subgroup
components AS (
    SELECT sg, MIN(reachable) AS component
    FROM reach
    GROUP BY sg
),
-- Assign each item its component (minimum component across its subgroups)
item_component AS (
    SELECT c.item, MIN(comp.component) AS component
    FROM combined c
    JOIN components comp ON c.sg = comp.sg
    GROUP BY c.item

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_team_attributes_eff_to() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    UPDATE team_attributes ta
    SET eff_to = subquery.next_date
    FROM (
        SELECT
            id,
            COALESCE(
                LEAD(TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE, 1) OVER (
                    PARTITION BY team_api_id
                    ORDER BY TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE ASC
                ),
                TO_DATE('5999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
            ) - 1 AS next_date
        FROM team_attributes
    ) AS subquery
    WHERE ta.id = subquery.id;
    RETURN NULL;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER after_insert_team_attributes

WITH RECURSIVE hierarchy AS (
    -- Base case: start from each employee, go to their direct boss (level 1)
    SELECT 
        e.id AS employee_id,
        e.salary AS employee_salary,
        m.id AS boss_id,
        m.salary AS boss_salary,
        m.bossid AS next_boss_id,
        1 AS level
    FROM staff e
    INNER JOIN staff m ON e.bossid = m.id

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive case: go up one more level in the hierarchy
    SELECT 
        h.employee_id,
        h.employee_salary,
        m.id AS boss_id,
        m.salary AS boss_salary,
        m.bossid AS next_boss_id,
        h.level + 1 AS level
    FROM hierarchy h
    INNER JOIN staff m ON h.next_boss_id = m.id
),
indirect_managers AS (
    -- Filter for indirect managers (level >= 2) with salary >= 2x employee salary
    SELECT 
        employee_id,
        employee_salary,
        level AS hierarchical_level,
        boss_id,
        boss_salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY employee_id ORDER BY level ASC) AS rn
    FROM hierarchy
    WHERE level >= 2
      AND boss_salary >= 2 * employee_salary
)
SELECT 
    employee_id AS employeeId,
    employee_salary AS employeeSalary,
    hierarchical_level,
    boss_id AS bossId,
    boss_salary AS bossSalary
FROM indirect_managers
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY employee_id

WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (
    SELECT 
        id, 
        amount, 
        amount AS cum_sum, 
        1 AS bucket
    FROM transfer
    WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM transfer)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t.id, 
        t.amount,
        CASE 
            WHEN cte.cum_sum + t.amount > 20 THEN t.amount 
            ELSE cte.cum_sum + t.amount 
        END AS cum_sum,
        CASE 
            WHEN cte.cum_sum + t.amount > 20 THEN cte.bucket + 1 
            ELSE cte.bucket 
        END AS bucket
    FROM cte
    JOIN transfer t ON t.id = (
        SELECT MIN(t2.id) FROM transfer t2 WHERE t2.id > cte.id
    )
)
SELECT 
    id, 
    amount, 
    cum_sum, 
    bucket
FROM cte
ORDER BY id

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN timestamp::date = '2022-01-27'::date - 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END) AS yesterday_revenue,

        (SUM(CASE WHEN timestamp::date = '2022-01-27'::date - 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END) 
         - SUM(CASE WHEN timestamp::date = '2022-01-27'::date - 8 THEN amount ELSE NULL END))
        / SUM(CASE WHEN timestamp::date = '2022-01-27'::date - 8 THEN amount ELSE NULL END)::numeric
    , 2) AS pct_change_week_ago,
    SUM(CASE WHEN date_trunc('month', timestamp::date) = date_trunc('month', '2022-01-27'::date - 1) 
              AND timestamp::date <= '2022-01-27'::date - 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END) AS mtd,
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN date_trunc('month', timestamp::date) = date_trunc('month', '2022-01-27'::date - 1)
                    AND timestamp::date <= '2022-01-27'::date - 1 THEN amount ELSE NULL END)
         - SUM(CASE WHEN date_trunc('month', timestamp::date) = date_trunc('month', '2022-01-27'::date - 1) - interval '1 month'
                    AND date_part('day', timestamp::date) <= date_part('day', '2022-01-27'::date - 1) THEN amount ELSE NULL END))
        / SUM(CASE WHEN date_trunc('month', timestamp::date) = date_trunc('month', '2022-01-27'::date - 1) - interval '1 month'
                    AND date_part('day', timestamp::date) <= date_part('day', '2022-01-27'::date - 1) THEN amount ELSE NULL END)::numeric

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION words_get_chat(in_gid integer, in_social integer, in_sid text)
RETURNS TABLE (out_mine integer, out_msg text) AS $func$
SELECT
    CASE WHEN c.uid = s.uid THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    c.msg
FROM words_chat c
JOIN words_games g USING (gid)
JOIN words_social s ON s.uid IN (g.player1, g.player2)
WHERE c.gid = in_gid
  AND s.social = in_social
  AND s.sid = in_sid
  AND (
    -- If the requesting user is muted, show all messages (so they don't notice)
    EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM words_users u WHERE u.uid = s.uid AND u.muted = true)
    OR
    -- If the requesting user is not muted, hide messages from muted users
    NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM words_users u WHERE u.uid = c.uid AND u.muted = true)
  )
ORDER BY c.created ASC;
$func$ LANGUAGE sql

    COALESCE(SUM(
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (

            GREATEST(T.incident_start, dd)
        )) / 60.0
    ), 0)::numeric AS incident_minutes

    '2022-01-01'::timestamp, 
    '2022-01-31'::timestamp,

),

    SELECT 
        budget_id, 
        category, 
        amount, 
        cum_amount
    FROM food_cumulative
    WHERE cum_amount <= 500
),
remaining_budget AS (
    SELECT 500 - COALESCE(MAX(cum_amount), 0) AS leftover
    FROM food_selected
),
ad_cumulative AS (
    SELECT 
        b.budget_id, 
        b.category, 
        b.amount,
        SUM(b.amount) OVER (ORDER BY b.amount ASC, b.budget_id) AS cum_amount
    FROM budget b

),
ad_selected AS (
    SELECT 
        a.budget_id, 
        a.category, 
        a.amount, 
        a.cum_amount
    FROM ad_cumulative a, remaining_budget r
    WHERE a.cum_amount <= r.leftover
),
combined AS (
    SELECT budget_id, category, amount, cum_amount
    FROM food_selected
    UNION ALL
    SELECT budget_id, category, amount, cum_amount
    FROM ad_selected
)
SELECT 
    budget_id, 
    category, 
    amount, 
    cum_amount
FROM combined
ORDER BY category DESC, amount ASC

WITH daily_first AS (
    -- Get the first price record for each card on each day
    SELECT 
        card_id,
        DATE(date_value) AS dt,
        date_value AS first_time,
        price AS first_price
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            card_id,
            date_value,
            price,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY card_id, DATE(date_value) ORDER BY date_value ASC) AS rn
        FROM card_prices
    ) t
    WHERE rn = 1
),
last_within_15 AS (
    -- Get the last available price within 15 minutes of the first price
    SELECT 
        df.card_id,
        df.dt,
        df.first_price,
        cp.price AS last_price_in_window
    FROM daily_first df
    JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT cp.price
        FROM card_prices cp
        WHERE cp.card_id = df.card_id
          AND cp.date_value >= df.first_time
          AND cp.date_value <= df.first_time + INTERVAL '15 minutes'
        ORDER BY cp.date_value DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) cp ON TRUE
)
SELECT 
    card_id,
    AVG(last_price_in_window - first_price) AS avg_difference
FROM last_within_15
GROUP BY card_id
ORDER BY card_id

WITH pivoted AS (
    SELECT
        dv.datapoint_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN var.name = 'ProductType' THEN vv.name END) AS product_type,
        MAX(CASE WHEN var.name = 'publishing_language' THEN vv.name END) AS publishing_language,
        MAX(CASE WHEN var.name = 'genre' THEN vv.name END) AS genre
    FROM datapoint_variablevalue dv
    JOIN variablevalue vv ON vv.id = dv.variablevalue_id
    JOIN variable var ON var.id = vv.variable_id
    GROUP BY dv.datapoint_id
),
all_product_types AS (
    SELECT vv.name AS product_type
    FROM variablevalue vv
    JOIN variable v ON v.id = vv.variable_id
    WHERE v.name = 'ProductType'
),
all_languages AS (
    SELECT vv.name AS publishing_language
    FROM variablevalue vv
    JOIN variable v ON v.id = vv.variable_id
    WHERE v.name = 'publishing_language'
),
all_genres AS (
    SELECT vv.name AS genre
    FROM variablevalue vv
    JOIN variable v ON v.id = vv.variable_id
    WHERE v.name = 'genre'
),
all_combinations AS (
    SELECT
        td.id AS time_id,
        td.years,
        sd.id AS spatial_id,
        sd.name AS sp_name,
        pt.product_type,
        al.publishing_language,
        ag.genre
    FROM time_dimension td
    CROSS JOIN spatial_dimension sd
    CROSS JOIN all_product_types pt
    CROSS JOIN all_languages al
    CROSS JOIN all_genres ag
)
SELECT
    COALESCE(SUM(dp.value), 0) AS total_sales,
    ac.years,
    ac.sp_name,
    ac.product_type,
    ac.publishing_language,
    ac.genre
FROM all_combinations ac
LEFT JOIN pivoted p
    ON p.product_type = ac.product_type
    AND p.publishing_language = ac.publishing_language
    AND p.genre = ac.genre
LEFT JOIN datapoints dp
    ON dp.id = p.datapoint_id
    AND dp.time_dimension_id = ac.time_id
    AND dp.spatial_dimension_id = ac.spatial_id
GROUP BY ac.years, ac.sp_name, ac.product_type, ac.publishing_language, ac.genre
ORDER BY ac.years DESC

WITH params AS (
    SELECT 
        TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36' AS start_ts,
        TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24' AS end_ts
),
weekdays AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS weekday_count
    FROM params,
    LATERAL generate_series(
        DATE_TRUNC('day', params.start_ts),
        DATE_TRUNC('day', params.end_ts) - INTERVAL '1 day',
        INTERVAL '1 day'
    ) AS d(day)
    WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM d.day) < 6
),
adjusted_start AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM p.start_ts) >= 6 
            THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', p.start_ts) + 
                 ((8 - EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM p.start_ts)::int) % 7) * INTERVAL '1 day'
            ELSE p.start_ts
        END AS adj_start,
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM p.end_ts) >= 6 
            THEN DATE_TRUNC('day', p.end_ts) + 
                 ((8 - EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM p.end_ts)::int) % 7) * INTERVAL '1 day'
            ELSE p.end_ts
        END AS adj_end
    FROM params p
),
result AS (
    SELECT 
        (w.weekday_count * INTERVAL '1 day') + 
        (a.adj_end - DATE_TRUNC('day', a.adj_end)) - 
        (a.adj_start - DATE_TRUNC('day', a.adj_start)) AS diff
    FROM weekdays w, adjusted_start a
)
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM diff) || ' days ' ||
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM diff) || ' hours ' ||
    EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM diff) || ' minutes ' ||
    EXTRACT(SECOND FROM diff) || ' seconds' AS time_diff
FROM result

WITH RECURSIVE item_craft_cost AS (
    -- Base case: items that only use resources (no sub-items)
    SELECT 
        s.item_id,
        s.item_price,
        s.resource_id,
        s.resource_price * s.quantity AS resource_cost,
        0 AS sub_item_cost,
        s.quantity,
        s.uses_item_id
    FROM store s
    WHERE s.resource_id IS NOT NULL AND s.resource_price IS NOT NULL
      AND (s.resource_price = s.resource_price) -- filters out NaN

    UNION ALL

    -- For rows that reference a sub-item, expand that sub-item's recipe
    SELECT 
        s.item_id,
        s.item_price,
        sub.resource_id,
        sub.resource_price * sub.quantity * s.quantity AS resource_cost,
        0 AS sub_item_cost,
        s.quantity,
        sub.uses_item_id
    FROM store s
    JOIN item_craft_cost sub ON s.uses_item_id = sub.item_id
    WHERE s.uses_item_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND s.uses_item_price IS NOT NULL
      AND (s.uses_item_price = s.uses_item_price) -- filters out NaN
),
partial_costs AS (
    SELECT 
        item_id,
        item_price AS retail_price,
        SUM(
            CASE WHEN resource_price = resource_price THEN COALESCE(resource_price * quantity, 0) ELSE 0 END
        ) + SUM(
            CASE WHEN uses_item_price = uses_item_price THEN COALESCE(uses_item_price * quantity, 0) ELSE 0 END
        ) AS partial_craft_price
    FROM store
    GROUP BY item_id, item_price
),
full_costs AS (
    SELECT 
        item_id,
        SUM(resource_cost) AS full_craft_price
    FROM item_craft_cost
    GROUP BY item_id
)
SELECT 
    p.item_id,
    p.retail_price,
    p.partial_craft_price,
    COALESCE(f.full_craft_price, p.partial_craft_price) AS full_craft_price
FROM partial_costs p
LEFT JOIN full_costs f ON p.item_id = f.item_id
ORDER BY p.item_id

WITH buys AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) - molecules AS cum_start,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cum_end
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 0
),
sells AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) - molecules AS cum_start,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cum_end
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 1
)
SELECT 
    b.molecule_id,
    b.date AS buy_date,
    s.date AS sell_date,
    MIN(b.cum_end, s.cum_end) - MAX(b.cum_start, s.cum_start) AS molecules,
    ROUND(
        (MIN(b.cum_end, s.cum_end) - MAX(b.cum_start, s.cum_start)) * 1.0 
        / b.molecules * b.usd_total, 
        2
    ) AS buy_usd_total,
    ROUND(
        (MIN(b.cum_end, s.cum_end) - MAX(b.cum_start, s.cum_start)) * 1.0 
        / s.molecules * s.usd_total, 
        2
    ) AS sell_usd_total
FROM buys b
JOIN sells s 
    ON b.molecule_id = s.molecule_id
    AND b.cum_start < s.cum_end
    AND s.cum_start < b.cum_end
ORDER BY b.molecule_id, b.date, s.date

WITH tokenized AS (
    SELECT id, string_to_array(event_description, '#') AS tokens
    FROM match_events
),
max_possible_len AS (
    SELECT MIN(array_length(tokens, 1)) AS min_len FROM tokenized
),
token_positions AS (
    SELECT pos
    FROM max_possible_len, generate_series(1, min_len) AS pos
),
common_positions AS (
    SELECT tp.pos
    FROM token_positions tp
    WHERE (
        SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.tokens[tp.pos]) = 1
        FROM tokenized t
    )
),
longest_prefix_length AS (
    -- Find the longest contiguous prefix: all positions from 1..N must be common
    SELECT COALESCE(MAX(pos), 0) AS prefix_len
    FROM (
        SELECT pos,
               ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY pos) AS rn
        FROM common_positions
    ) sub
    WHERE pos = rn
),
result AS (
    SELECT array_to_string(
        (SELECT tokens[1:prefix_len] 
         FROM tokenized 
         LIMIT 1),
        '#'
    ) AS common_prefix
    FROM longest_prefix_length
)
SELECT COALESCE(common_prefix, '') AS common_prefix FROM result

                 THEN date_trunc('month', end_date)

WITH RECURSIVE user_edges AS (
    -- Users sharing the same ref1
    SELECT u1.id AS id1, u2.id AS id2
    FROM users u1
    JOIN users u2 ON u1.ref1 = u2.ref1 AND u1.id <> u2.id
    UNION
    -- Users sharing the same ref2
    SELECT u1.id AS id1, u2.id AS id2
    FROM users u1
    JOIN users u2 ON u1.ref2 = u2.ref2 AND u1.id <> u2.id
),
components AS (
    -- Start with each user as its own component (min id as representative)
    SELECT id AS user_id, id AS component_id FROM users
    UNION
    SELECT e.id2, c.component_id
    FROM components c
    JOIN user_edges e ON c.user_id = e.id1 AND e.id2 <> c.component_id
),
min_components AS (
    SELECT user_id, MIN(component_id) AS component_id
    FROM components
    GROUP BY user_id
),
-- Gather all refs per component
component_refs AS (
    SELECT mc.component_id,
           ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT u.ref1) AS refs1,
           ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT u.ref2) AS refs2
    FROM min_components mc
    JOIN users u ON u.id = mc.user_id
    GROUP BY mc.component_id
),
-- Assets matched to components via ref1 or ref2
matched_assets AS (
    SELECT cr.component_id, a.id AS asset_id, a.name AS asset_name
    FROM component_refs cr
    JOIN assets a ON a.owner = ANY(cr.refs1) OR a.owner = ANY(cr.refs2)
),
-- Assets with no user match (missing entries)
unmatched_assets AS (
    SELECT a.id AS asset_id, a.name AS asset_name, a.owner
    FROM assets a
    LEFT JOIN users u ON a.owner = u.ref1 OR a.owner = u.ref2
    WHERE u.id IS NULL
),
-- Grouped results for matched
grouped_matched AS (
    SELECT cr.component_id,
           ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT u.id ORDER BY u.id) AS ids,
           ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT u.username ORDER BY u.username) AS usernames,
           ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT u.ref1 ORDER BY u.ref1) AS refs1,
           ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT u.ref2 ORDER BY u.ref2) AS refs2,
           COUNT(DISTINCT ma.asset_id) AS asset_count,
           ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT ma.asset_id ORDER BY ma.asset_id) AS asset_ids
    FROM component_refs cr
    JOIN min_components mc ON mc.component_id = cr.component_id
    JOIN users u ON u.id = mc.user_id
    LEFT JOIN matched_assets ma ON ma.component_id = cr.component_id
    GROUP BY cr.component_id
)
SELECT ids, usernames, refs1, refs2, asset_count, asset_ids
FROM grouped_matched

UNION ALL

SELECT
    NULL::integer[] AS ids,
    NULL::text[] AS usernames,
    NULL::text[] AS refs1,
    ARRAY[owner] AS refs2,
    COUNT(asset_id)::bigint AS asset_count,
    ARRAY_AGG(asset_id ORDER BY asset_id) AS asset_ids
FROM unmatched_assets
GROUP BY owner

ORDER BY asset_ids

WITH RECURSIVE ordered AS (
    SELECT 
        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY prediction_code ASC) AS rn
    FROM performance_predictions
),
A(GroupNum, n, RollingSum, rn) AS (
    SELECT 
        1::bigint, 
        Performance_Prediction, 
        Performance_Prediction, 
        rn
    FROM ordered
    WHERE rn = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction > 200
            THEN A.GroupNum + 1
            ELSE A.GroupNum
        END,
        O.Performance_Prediction,
        CASE
            WHEN A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction > 200
            THEN O.Performance_Prediction
            ELSE A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction
        END,
        O.rn
    FROM A
    JOIN ordered AS O ON A.rn + 1 = O.rn
)
SELECT
    GroupNum AS group_number,
    SUM(n) AS group_cumulative_sum
FROM A
GROUP BY GroupNum
ORDER BY GroupNum

SELECT
  admin_week,
  COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    date,
    CASE
      WHEN (date - DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date) < 
           (7 - EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date)::int) % 7 + 1
        THEN 1
      ELSE
        FLOOR(
          (
            (date - DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date)
            - ((7 - EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date)::int) % 7)
          )::numeric / 7
        ) + 2
    END AS admin_week
  FROM laboratory
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
) sub
GROUP BY admin_week
ORDER BY admin_week

WITH RECURSIVE curricula_to_upgrade AS (
    -- Anchor: start with the specific curriculum
    SELECT c.curriculum_id
    FROM curricula c
    WHERE c.curriculum_id = 1
      AND c.status = 'installed'

    UNION

    -- Recursive: find other curricula that share resources with already-found curricula
    SELECT cr2.curriculum_id
    FROM curricula_to_upgrade ctu
    JOIN curriculum_resources cr1
         ON cr1.curriculum_id = ctu.curriculum_id
    JOIN curriculum_resources cr2
         ON cr2.resource_key = cr1.resource_key
    JOIN curricula c2
         ON c2.curriculum_id = cr2.curriculum_id
    WHERE c2.status = 'installed'
      AND cr2.curriculum_id <> ctu.curriculum_id
)
UPDATE curricula
SET status = 'to upgrade'
WHERE curriculum_id IN (
    SELECT curriculum_id
    FROM curricula_to_upgrade
)

SELECT
    link_to_event,
    CASE
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Closed') THEN 'Closed'
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Open') AND BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Planning') THEN 'Open'
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Open') THEN 'Open'
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Planning') THEN 'Planning'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS consolidated_status,
    CASE
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Closed') THEN
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN remaining END)
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Open') AND BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Planning') THEN
            COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN spent END), 0)
            + COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN spent END), 0)
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Open') THEN
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN spent END)
        WHEN BOOL_OR(event_status = 'Planning') THEN
            MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN spent END)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS financial_value
FROM budget
GROUP BY link_to_event

SELECT

    l.cluster_type AS left_type,
    l.cluster_label AS left_label,
    r.cluster AS right_id,
    r.cluster_type AS right_type,
    r.cluster_label AS right_label,
    count(distinct l.article) AS articles,
    array_agg(distinct links.type) AS link_types
FROM tag AS l
JOIN tag AS r 
    ON l.cluster > r.cluster

WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY alb, art, feat_arts::text
            ORDER BY start_date
        ) AS rn
    FROM sp_album
),
flagged AS (
    SELECT o.*,
        CASE
            WHEN prev.end_date IS NOT NULL 
                 AND o.start_date = prev.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day'
            THEN 0
            WHEN prev.end_date IS NULL 
                 AND prev.alb IS NOT NULL
            THEN 0
            ELSE 1
        END AS new_group_flag
    FROM ordered o
    LEFT JOIN ordered prev
        ON o.alb = prev.alb
       AND o.art = prev.art
       AND o.feat_arts::text = prev.feat_arts::text
       AND o.rn = prev.rn + 1
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT *,
        SUM(new_group_flag) OVER (
            PARTITION BY alb, art, feat_arts::text
            ORDER BY start_date
            ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
        ) AS grp
    FROM flagged
)
SELECT
    alb,
    art,
    feat_arts,
    MIN(start_date) AS start_date,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE end_date IS NULL) > 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE MAX(end_date)
    END AS end_date
FROM grouped
GROUP BY alb, art, feat_arts::text, feat_arts, grp
ORDER BY alb, art, start_date

WITH data AS (

        county,

        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY county ORDER BY cdscode ASC) AS rnk
    FROM schools

    SELECT 
        a.cdscode AS cdscode1, 
        a.county AS county1, 
        b.cdscode AS cdscode2, 
        b.county AS county2,
        a.rnk AS rnk1,
        b.rnk AS rnk2
    FROM data AS a
    INNER JOIN data AS b 
        ON a.county = b.county 
        AND b.rnk = a.rnk + 1
    WHERE a.rnk % 2 = 1
)

    cdscode1, 
    county1, 
    cdscode2,

    CASE

FROM county_pairs
ORDER BY county1, rnk1

WITH time_points AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ts
    FROM (
        SELECT start AS ts FROM duration
        UNION
        SELECT "end" AS ts FROM duration
    ) all_points
),
intervals AS (
    SELECT
        ts AS interval_start,
        LEAD(ts) OVER (ORDER BY ts) AS interval_end
    FROM time_points
)
SELECT
    i.interval_start,
    i.interval_end,
    COUNT(d.id) AS concurrent_count
FROM intervals i
LEFT JOIN duration d
    ON d.start < i.interval_end
   AND d."end" > i.interval_start
WHERE i.interval_end IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY i.interval_start, i.interval_end
ORDER BY i.interval_start

WITH team_records AS (
    SELECT
        ta.id,
        ta.team_api_id,
        ta.date,
        ta.buildupplayspeed,
        ta.buildupplaypassing,
        ta.chancecreationshooting,
        ta.defenceteamwidth,
        ta.chancecreationpassing,
        ta.chancecreationcrossing,
        ta.defencepressure,
        ta.defenceaggression,
        LEAD(ta.buildupplayspeed) OVER (PARTITION BY ta.team_api_id ORDER BY ta.date) AS next_buildupplayspeed,
        LEAD(ta.buildupplaypassing) OVER (PARTITION BY ta.team_api_id ORDER BY ta.date) AS next_buildupplaypassing,
        LAG(ta.defenceteamwidth) OVER (PARTITION BY ta.team_api_id ORDER BY ta.date) AS prev_defenceteamwidth,
        LAG(ta.chancecreationshooting) OVER (PARTITION BY ta.team_api_id ORDER BY ta.date) AS prev_chancecreationshooting,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ta.team_api_id) AS team_record_count
    FROM team_attributes AS ta
)
SELECT
    id,
    team_api_id,
    date,
    buildupplayspeed,
    next_buildupplayspeed,
    buildupplaypassing,
    next_buildupplaypassing,
    defenceteamwidth,
    prev_defenceteamwidth,
    chancecreationshooting,
    prev_chancecreationshooting,
    chancecreationpassing,
    chancecreationcrossing,
    defencepressure,

FROM team_records
WHERE team_record_count > 1
  AND prev_defenceteamwidth > buildupplayspeed
ORDER BY team_api_id, date

BEGIN;

-- First, refresh the backup table from the current latest (before merge)
TRUNCATE treatment_and_followup_backup;
INSERT INTO treatment_and_followup_backup
SELECT * FROM treatment_and_followup_latest;

-- Now merge source into target, including deletion of rows not in source
MERGE INTO treatment_and_followup_latest t
USING treatment_and_followup s
ON t.treatment_followup_id = s.treatment_followup_id
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
    patient_id = s.patient_id,
    followup_no = s.followup_no,
    primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score = s.primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score,
    primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group = s.primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group,
    primary_pathology_radiation_therapy = s.primary_pathology_radiation_therapy,
    primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx = s.primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx,
    has_follow_ups_information = s.has_follow_ups_information,
    has_drugs_information = s.has_drugs_information,
    has_radiations_information = s.has_radiations_information,
    project = s.project,
    day_of_form_completion = s.day_of_form_completion,
    month_of_form_completion = s.month_of_form_completion,
    year_of_form_completion = s.year_of_form_completion
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
    treatment_followup_id, patient_id, followup_no,
    primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score,
    primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group,
    primary_pathology_radiation_therapy,
    primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx,
    has_follow_ups_information, has_drugs_information,
    has_radiations_information, project,
    day_of_form_completion, month_of_form_completion,
    year_of_form_completion
) VALUES (
    s.treatment_followup_id, s.patient_id, s.followup_no,
    s.primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score,
    s.primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group,
    s.primary_pathology_radiation_therapy,
    s.primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx,
    s.has_follow_ups_information, s.has_drugs_information,
    s.has_radiations_information, s.project,
    s.day_of_form_completion, s.month_of_form_completion,
    s.year_of_form_completion
)
WHEN NOT MATCHED BY SOURCE THEN DELETE;

WITH pages AS (SELECT 1 AS page_id, 1 AS power_id UNION ALL SELECT 1, 7 UNION ALL SELECT 2, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 7 UNION ALL SELECT 3, 89 UNION ALL SELECT 4, 20 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 55 UNION ALL SELECT 5, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 6, 13), items AS (SELECT 10 AS hero_id, 1 AS power_id UNION ALL SELECT 10, 7 UNION ALL SELECT 10, 20 UNION ALL SELECT 12, 1 UNION ALL SELECT 12, 55) SELECT p.page_id, i.hero_id FROM (SELECT p.page_id, p.power_id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.page_id) AS total_powers FROM pages AS p) AS p INNER JOIN items AS i ON p.power_id = i.power_id GROUP BY p.page_id, i.hero_id, p.total_powers HAVING COUNT(i.power_id) >= p.total_powers

WITH status_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        r.driverid, 
        s.status, 
        COUNT(*) AS cnt,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.driverid ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) AS rn
    FROM results r
    JOIN status s ON r.statusid = s.statusid
    GROUP BY r.driverid, s.status
)
SELECT 
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driver_name,
    sc.status AS most_common_status
FROM status_counts sc
JOIN drivers d ON sc.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE sc.rn = 1

WITH home_matches AS (
    SELECT
        home_team_api_id,
        date,
        CASE WHEN home_team_goal > away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_win,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS match_rn
    FROM match
),
home_wins AS (
    SELECT
        home_team_api_id,
        date,
        match_rn,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY home_team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS win_rn
    FROM home_matches
    WHERE is_win = 1
),
streaks AS (
    SELECT
        home_team_api_id,
        date,
        match_rn - win_rn AS streak_group
    FROM home_wins
)
SELECT
    home_team_api_id AS team_api_id,
    MIN(date) AS start_date,
    MAX(date) AS end_date,
    COUNT(*) AS match_count
FROM streaks
GROUP BY home_team_api_id, streak_group
ORDER BY home_team_api_id, start_date
SELECT unnest(string_to_array('1.25,5.34,6.9', ','))::FLOAT AS value

SELECT

INNER JOIN examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID

WITH RankedRaces AS (
    SELECT
        res.driverId,
        res.points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY res.driverId 
            ORDER BY r.date, r.round, r.raceId
        ) AS CareerRaceNumber
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
),
DriverFirstFiveRaces AS (
    SELECT
        driverId,
        points,
        CareerRaceNumber
    FROM RankedRaces
    WHERE CareerRaceNumber <= 5
)
SELECT
    d.driverId,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS DriverName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 1 THEN points END) AS Race1_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 2 THEN points END) AS Race2_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 3 THEN points END) AS Race3_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 4 THEN points END) AS Race4_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 5 THEN points END) AS Race5_Points
FROM DriverFirstFiveRaces r
JOIN drivers d ON r.driverId = d.driverId
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname
ORDER BY d.surname, d.forename

WITH years AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM transact_dt_tm) AS bond_year
    FROM bond_list
    WHERE transact_dt_tm IS NOT NULL
),
all_combinations AS (
    SELECT
        y.bond_year,
        br.bond_type,
        br.bond_seq
    FROM years y
    CROSS JOIN bond_ref br
)
SELECT
    ac.bond_year AS "year",
    ac.bond_type,
    COUNT(bl.bond_id) AS bond_count
FROM all_combinations ac
LEFT JOIN bond_list bl
    ON ac.bond_type = bl.bond_type
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM bl.transact_dt_tm) = ac.bond_year
GROUP BY ac.bond_year, ac.bond_type, ac.bond_seq
ORDER BY ac.bond_year, ac.bond_seq

WITH t AS

   FROM examination AS e),
     cte AS
  (SELECT t.id,
          t."Examination Date" AS startdate,
          t.seqnum,
          'N' AS isrehire,
          t."Examination Date" AS anchordate
   FROM t
   WHERE t.seqnum = 1
   UNION ALL SELECT t.id,
                    t."Examination Date" AS startdate,
                    t.seqnum,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t."Examination Date" > (cte.anchordate + INTERVAL '1 year') THEN 'Y'
                        ELSE 'N'
                    END AS isrehire,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t."Examination Date" > (cte.anchordate + INTERVAL '1 year') THEN t."Examination Date"
                        ELSE cte.anchordate
                    END AS anchordate
   FROM cte
   INNER JOIN t ON cte.id = t.id
   AND t.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1)

       isrehire
FROM cte

WITH RECURSIVE ancestry AS (
    -- Base case: start with sets that have a parent
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        s.code,
        s.parentcode,
        s.code AS ancestral_path
    FROM sets s
    WHERE s.parentcode IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive step: follow the parent chain upward
    SELECT 
        a.id,
        a.code,
        p.parentcode,
        a.ancestral_path || '-' || p.code AS ancestral_path
    FROM ancestry a
    JOIN sets p ON a.parentcode = p.code
)
SELECT 
    a.id,
    a.code,
    a.ancestral_path AS ancestralCode
FROM ancestry a
WHERE a.parentcode IS NULL
ORDER BY a.id

WITH hero_activity AS (
    SELECT id,
           activity_date::date AS activity_date,
           activity_value,
           hero_id
    FROM (
        VALUES 
            (1, '2023-01-01', 10, 1),
            (2, '2023-01-02', 20, 1),
            (3, '2023-02-01', 15, 1),
            (4, '2023-02-02', 25, 1),
            (5, '2023-01-03', 30, 2),
            (6, '2023-02-03', 40, 2)
    ) AS t (id, activity_date, activity_value, hero_id)
),
monthly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', activity_date) AS month_start,
        SUM(activity_value) AS month_total
    FROM hero_activity
    GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', activity_date)
)
SELECT 
    ha.id,
    ha.activity_date,
    ha.activity_value,
    SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (
        ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id
    ) AS run_tot,
    SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (
        PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC('month', ha.activity_date)
        ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id
    ) AS m_run_tot,
    COALESCE(mt_prev.month_total, 0) AS prev_month_total
FROM hero_activity ha
LEFT JOIN monthly_totals mt_prev
    ON mt_prev.month_start = DATE_TRUNC('month', ha.activity_date) - INTERVAL '1 month'
ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id

SELECT

WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT
        s.cdscode,
        s.school,
        s.fundingtype,
        s.lastupdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.cdscode ORDER BY s.lastupdate) AS rn,
        LAG(s.school) OVER (PARTITION BY s.cdscode ORDER BY s.lastupdate) AS prev_school,
        LAG(s.fundingtype) OVER (PARTITION BY s.cdscode ORDER BY s.lastupdate) AS prev_fundingtype
    FROM schools s
)
SELECT
    cdscode,
    'School' AS ColumnName,
    COALESCE(prev_school, '') AS OldValue,
    COALESCE(school, '') AS NewValue
FROM ordered
WHERE rn > 1
  AND (
      (prev_school IS NULL AND school IS NOT NULL)
      OR (prev_school IS NOT NULL AND school IS NULL)
      OR (prev_school <> school)
  )

UNION ALL

SELECT
    cdscode,
    'FundingType' AS ColumnName,
    COALESCE(prev_fundingtype, '') AS OldValue,
    COALESCE(fundingtype, '') AS NewValue
FROM ordered
WHERE rn > 1
  AND (
      (prev_fundingtype IS NULL AND fundingtype IS NOT NULL)
      OR (prev_fundingtype IS NOT NULL AND fundingtype IS NULL)
      OR (prev_fundingtype <> fundingtype)
  )

ORDER BY
    cdscode,
    CASE WHEN ColumnName = 'School' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END

        id,
        "Examination Date",
        thrombosis,
        LAG(thrombosis, 1, thrombosis) OVER (
            PARTITION BY id 
            ORDER BY "Examination Date"
        ) AS risklag,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY id,
                         EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "Examination Date"),
                         EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "Examination Date")
            ORDER BY "Examination Date" DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM examination
),
last_per_month AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        "Examination Date",
        thrombosis,
        risklag
    FROM ranked
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    id,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', "Examination Date")::DATE AS startofmonth,
    CASE 
        WHEN thrombosis > risklag THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS increase_risk,

    END AS decrease_risk
FROM last_per_month

WITH RECURSIVE ExpCTE AS (
    SELECT
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY exp_id) AS ExpRN,
        exp_id,
        mid,
        qty
    FROM Experiment
    WHERE mid = 2
),
CTE AS (
    -- Base case: first experiment for mid=2
    SELECT
        e.exp_id,
        e.mid,
        e.qty,
        e.ExpRN,
        CASE WHEN e.qty <= i.qty THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS executable,
        CASE WHEN e.qty <= i.qty THEN i.qty - e.qty ELSE i.qty END AS QtyAvailable
    FROM ExpCTE e
    INNER JOIN Inventory i ON i.mid = e.mid
    WHERE e.ExpRN = 1

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive step: process next experiment
    SELECT
        e.exp_id,
        e.mid,
        e.qty,
        e.ExpRN,
        CASE WHEN e.qty <= c.QtyAvailable THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS executable,
        CASE WHEN e.qty <= c.QtyAvailable THEN c.QtyAvailable - e.qty ELSE c.QtyAvailable END AS QtyAvailable
    FROM ExpCTE e
    INNER JOIN CTE c ON c.ExpRN + 1 = e.ExpRN
)
SELECT exp_id, mid, executable
FROM CTE
ORDER BY exp_id

WITH set_a (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
    SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT element)
    FROM atom
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT element) > 1
),
set_b (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.element)
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE m.label IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
),
unique_a (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        element_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
    FROM set_a
),
unique_b (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        element_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
    FROM set_b
),
filtered_join AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id AS a_molecule_id,
        a.rn AS a_rn,
        a.density_rank AS a_density_rank,
        b.molecule_id AS b_molecule_id,
        b.rn AS b_rn,
        b.density_rank AS b_density_rank
    FROM unique_a a
    FULL OUTER JOIN unique_b b
        ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND a.rn = b.rn
    WHERE
        (
            a.molecule_id IS NULL
            OR (
                EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM bond
                    WHERE bond.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
                      AND bond.bond_id = 'TR011_2_24'
                )
                AND EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM connected c
                    JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
                    JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
                    WHERE a1.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
                      AND a1.element = a2.element
                )
            )
        )
)
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a_molecule_id IS NOT NULL AND b_molecule_id IS NOT NULL
                    AND a_rn = b_rn AND a_density_rank = b_density_rank
               THEN 1 END) AS num_identical_in_a_and_b,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a_molecule_id IS NOT NULL AND b_molecule_id IS NULL
               THEN 1 END) AS num_only_in_a,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a_molecule_id IS NULL AND b_molecule_id IS NOT NULL
               THEN 1 END) AS num_only_in_b
FROM filtered_join

WITH KEYWORDMATCHES AS
  (SELECT P.ID,
          CASE
              WHEN POSITION(LOWER('Aaron') IN LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Aaron'
          END AS COLAKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN POSITION(LOWER('Cresswell') IN LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Cresswell'
          END AS COLBKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN POSITION(LOWER('Doran') IN LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Doran'
          END AS COLCKEYWORD
   FROM PLAYER AS P),
     KEYWORDSCORES AS
  (SELECT ID,
          STRING_AGG(COLAKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER (WHERE COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL) AS KEYWORDSA,
          STRING_AGG(COLBKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER (WHERE COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL) AS KEYWORDSB,
          STRING_AGG(COLCKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER (WHERE COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL) AS KEYWORDSC,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 10
                  ELSE 0
              END) AS COLASCORE,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 5
                  ELSE 0
              END) AS COLBSCORE,
          SUM(CASE
                  WHEN COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 0.1
                  ELSE 0
              END) AS COLCSCORE
   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS KM
   GROUP BY ID)
SELECT P.ID,
       P.PLAYER_NAME AS DESCRIPTION,
       (KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE) AS SCORE
FROM PLAYER AS P
INNER JOIN KEYWORDSCORES AS KS ON P.ID = KS.ID
ORDER BY SCORE DESC

SATData AS (

columns_xml AS (

WITH date_series AS (
    SELECT
        b.id,
        b.rate,
        b.time_span,
        d::date AS the_date,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM LOWER(b.time_span))::int AS start_dom
    FROM budgets b
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
        LOWER(b.time_span)::timestamp,
        COALESCE(UPPER(b.time_span), NOW())::timestamp - INTERVAL '1 day',
        INTERVAL '1 day'
    ) AS d
),
with_periods AS (
    SELECT
        the_date,
        rate,
        time_span,
        start_dom,
        -- Find the start of the current monthly period
        CASE
            WHEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM the_date) >= start_dom
            THEN make_date(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM the_date)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM the_date)::int, start_dom)
            ELSE make_date(
                EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (the_date - INTERVAL '1 month'))::int,
                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (the_date - INTERVAL '1 month'))::int,
                start_dom
            )
        END AS period_start
    FROM date_series
),
with_period_bounds AS (
    SELECT
        the_date,
        rate,
        time_span,
        period_start,
        -- The end of the period is the start + 1 month
        (period_start + INTERVAL '1 month')::date AS period_end_raw
    FROM with_periods
),
with_day_counts AS (
    SELECT
        the_date,
        rate,
        period_start,
        -- If the period extends beyond the upper bound of time_span, cap it
        LEAST(
            period_end_raw,
            COALESCE(UPPER(time_span)::date, period_end_raw)
        ) AS period_end,
        LEAST(
            period_end_raw,
            COALESCE(UPPER(time_span)::date, period_end_raw)
        ) - period_start AS days_in_period
    FROM with_period_bounds
)
SELECT
    the_date,
    ROUND(rate::numeric / days_in_period, 2) AS daily_rate
FROM with_day_counts
ORDER BY the_date

WITH "my_table" AS (
    SELECT 'A' AS "cto", 1 AS "nif", 'A1' AS "file_", 5 AS "filesize"
    UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 1, 'A2', 3
    UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A3', 2
    UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A4', 1
    UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B1', 4
    UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B2', 6
),
ordered AS (
    SELECT t.*,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto" ORDER BY SUBSTR("file_", 1, 1), CAST(SUBSTR("file_", 2) AS INTEGER)) AS "rn",
           SUM("filesize") OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "nif") AS "nif_size"
    FROM "my_table" t
),
nif_groups AS (
    SELECT *,
           CASE WHEN ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "nif" ORDER BY "rn") = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_first_in_nif
    FROM ordered
),
nif_block_info AS (
    SELECT *,
           SUM(is_first_in_nif) OVER (PARTITION BY "cto" ORDER BY "rn") AS nif_block_num
    FROM nif_groups
),
nif_blocks AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT "cto", nif_block_num, "nif", "nif_size"
    FROM nif_block_info
),
-- Recursive CTE to assign partitions based on cumulative size <= 10
recursive_parts AS (
    SELECT "cto", nif_block_num, "nif", "nif_size",
           1 AS "mn",
           "nif_size" AS running_size
    FROM nif_blocks
    WHERE nif_block_num = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT nb."cto", nb.nif_block_num, nb."nif", nb."nif_size",
           CASE WHEN rp.running_size + nb."nif_size" > 10 THEN rp."mn" + 1 ELSE rp."mn" END,
           CASE WHEN rp.running_size + nb."nif_size" > 10 THEN nb."nif_size" ELSE rp.running_size + nb."nif_size" END
    FROM recursive_parts rp
    JOIN nif_blocks nb ON nb."cto" = rp."cto" AND nb.nif_block_num = rp.nif_block_num + 1
),
-- Secondary grouping: limit ~7 items per partition group
with_mn AS (
    SELECT bi.*, rp."mn"
    FROM nif_block_info bi
    JOIN recursive_parts rp ON bi."cto" = rp."cto" AND bi.nif_block_num = rp.nif_block_num
),
mn_numbered AS (
    SELECT *,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "mn" ORDER BY nif_block_num) AS mn_rank,
           FIRST_VALUE("mn") OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "mn" ORDER BY "rn") AS first_mn_in_group
    FROM with_mn
),
partitioned AS (
    SELECT *,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto" ORDER BY "mn", ((mn_rank - 1) / 7)) AS "partition",
           "mn" AS orig_mn
    FROM mn_numbered
),
final AS (
    SELECT "cto", "nif", "file_",
           "partition",
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "partition" ORDER BY "rn") AS "subpartition",
           SUM("filesize") OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "partition") AS "total_size"
    FROM partitioned
)
SELECT "cto", "nif", "file_", "partition", "subpartition", "total_size"
FROM final
ORDER BY "cto", "partition", "subpartition"

WITH ranges AS (
    SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS valid_from,
           TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS valid_until
    UNION ALL
    SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS valid_from,
           TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS valid_until
),
events AS (
    SELECT valid_from AS dt, 1 AS cnt
    FROM ranges
    UNION ALL
    SELECT valid_until + INTERVAL '1 day', -1 AS cnt
    FROM ranges
),
event_points AS (
    SELECT dt,
           SUM(cnt) AS point_cnt
    FROM events
    GROUP BY dt
),
cumulative AS (
    SELECT dt AS valid_from,
           LEAD(dt) OVER (ORDER BY dt) - INTERVAL '1 day' AS valid_until,
           SUM(point_cnt) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS count
    FROM event_points
)
SELECT valid_from,
       valid_until,
       count
FROM cumulative

WITH RECURSIVE vt AS (
    SELECT t.*, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY StartDate, TransactionID) AS seqnum
    FROM transactions_1k t
),
cte AS (
    SELECT vt.TransactionID, vt.CustomerID, vt.StartDate, vt.EndDate,
           vt.EndDate AS reference_end_date,
           0 AS flag,
           seqnum
    FROM vt
    WHERE seqnum = 1
    UNION ALL
    SELECT vt.TransactionID, vt.CustomerID, vt.StartDate, vt.EndDate,
           CASE 
               WHEN vt.StartDate <= (cte.reference_end_date + interval '90 days') 
               THEN cte.reference_end_date
               ELSE vt.EndDate 
           END,
           CASE 
               WHEN vt.StartDate <= (cte.reference_end_date + interval '90 days') 
               THEN 1 
               ELSE 0 
           END,
           vt.seqnum
    FROM cte
    JOIN vt ON vt.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1 AND vt.CustomerID = cte.CustomerID
)
SELECT cte.TransactionID, cte.CustomerID, cte.StartDate, cte.EndDate, cte.flag

    -- Recursive step: follow parent links upward
    SELECT c.start_id, t.id, t.parentid

)
-- Select only the root ancestors (where parentid IS NULL or no further parent exists)

WITH ordered_contracts AS (
    SELECT
        driverid,
        contracttype,
        startdate,
        enddate,
        MAX(enddate) OVER (
            PARTITION BY driverid, contracttype
            ORDER BY startdate
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
        ) AS max_prev_enddate
    FROM drivercontracts
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT
        driverid,
        contracttype,
        startdate,
        enddate,
        SUM(CASE
            WHEN max_prev_enddate IS NULL THEN 1
            WHEN startdate > max_prev_enddate THEN 1
            ELSE 0
        END) OVER (
            PARTITION BY driverid, contracttype
            ORDER BY startdate
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS grp
    FROM ordered_contracts
)
SELECT
    driverid,
    contracttype,
    MIN(startdate) AS startdate,
    MAX(enddate) AS enddate
FROM grouped
GROUP BY driverid, contracttype, grp
ORDER BY driverid, contracttype, startdate

WITH RECURSIVE
-- Step 1: Merge overlapping blackout periods
blackout_ordered AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY start_date, end_date) AS rn
    FROM blackout_periods
),
merged_blackouts AS (
    -- Start with the first blackout period
    SELECT rn, start_date, end_date
    FROM blackout_ordered
    WHERE rn = 1

    UNION ALL

    -- For each subsequent period, either extend the current merged range or start a new one
    SELECT b.rn,
           CASE WHEN b.start_date <= m.end_date THEN m.start_date ELSE b.start_date END,
           CASE WHEN b.start_date <= m.end_date THEN GREATEST(m.end_date, b.end_date) ELSE b.end_date END
    FROM blackout_ordered b
    JOIN merged_blackouts m ON b.rn = m.rn + 1
),
-- Keep only the final merged intervals (where the next row starts a new interval or it's the last)
final_merged AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date
    FROM merged_blackouts m
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM merged_blackouts m2
        WHERE m2.rn = m.rn + 1
          AND m2.start_date = m.start_date
    )
),
-- Step 2: Compute the complement (inverse) of merged blackout periods
-- These are the "clear" windows between blackouts (and before/after all blackouts)
ordered_merged AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY start_date) AS rn
    FROM final_merged
),
inverse_blackouts AS (
    -- Gap before the first blackout
    SELECT '1900-01-01'::date AS start_date,
           (MIN(start_date) - INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS end_date
    FROM final_merged

    UNION ALL

    -- Gaps between consecutive blackouts
    SELECT (a.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS start_date,
           (b.start_date - INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS end_date
    FROM ordered_merged a
    JOIN ordered_merged b ON b.rn = a.rn + 1

    UNION ALL

    -- Gap after the last blackout
    SELECT (MAX(end_date) + INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS start_date,
           '9999-01-01'::date AS end_date
    FROM final_merged
),
valid_inverse AS (
    SELECT start_date, end_date
    FROM inverse_blackouts
    WHERE start_date <= end_date
)
-- Step 3: Intersect active periods with non-blackout (clear) periods
SELECT
    GREATEST(a.start_date, v.start_date) AS start_date,
    LEAST(a.end_date, v.end_date) AS end_date
FROM account_activity a
JOIN valid_inverse v
  ON a.start_date < v.end_date
 AND v.start_date < a.end_date
WHERE GREATEST(a.start_date, v.start_date) <= LEAST(a.end_date, v.end_date)
ORDER BY start_date

    FROM attendance

WITH type_years AS (

        MIN(CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', event_date) AS INTEGER)) AS earliest_year,
        MAX(CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', event_date) AS INTEGER)) AS latest_year
    FROM event
    WHERE event_date IS NOT NULL AND type IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY type
),
counts AS (
    SELECT
        e.type,
        ty.earliest_year,
        ty.latest_year,
        SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', e.event_date) AS INTEGER) = ty.latest_year THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS latest_count,
        SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', e.event_date) AS INTEGER) = ty.earliest_year THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS earliest_count
    FROM event e
    JOIN type_years ty ON e.type = ty.type
    WHERE e.event_date IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY e.type, ty.earliest_year, ty.latest_year
)
SELECT
    type AS event_type,
    latest_count - earliest_count AS year_difference
FROM counts

WITH "MY_TABLE" AS
  (SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   UNION ALL SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'DUMMY' AS "ASSET_TYPE"),
     "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" AS
  (SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
          1 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'NOTIONALDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    1 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE",

WITH src(id, geom) AS (
    VALUES 
        (1, 'LINESTRING(0 0, 0 10)'::geometry),
        (2, 'LINESTRING(0 10, 0 11)'::geometry),
        (3, 'LINESTRING(1 1, 0 5)'::geometry),
        (4, 'LINESTRING(1 1, 2 2)'::geometry)
)
SELECT a.id, b.id AS touches_id, ST_AsText(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom)) AS intersection_point
FROM src AS a
JOIN src AS b ON a.id != b.id
WHERE ST_Touches(a.geom, b.geom)
  AND NOT ST_Equals(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom), ST_StartPoint(a.geom))
  AND NOT ST_Equals(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom), ST_EndPoint(a.geom))

WITH RECURSIVE date_series AS (
    -- Generate all dates that could be relevant from the event_usage table
    SELECT 
        (MIN(start_timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date AS d,
        (MAX(end_timestamp) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date AS max_d
    FROM event_usage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT d + 1, max_d
    FROM date_series
    WHERE d < max_d
),
working_windows AS (
    -- For each weekday, define the 9:00-18:00 working window
    SELECT
        d,
        (d + TIME '09:00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS work_start,
        (d + TIME '18:00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS work_end
    FROM date_series
    WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM d) BETWEEN 1 AND 5  -- Monday=1 to Friday=5
),
overlap_calc AS (
    -- Calculate the overlap between each event and each working window
    SELECT
        eu.learner_code,
        eu.resource_key,
        eu.id,
        ww.d,
        GREATEST(
            0,
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
                LEAST(eu.end_timestamp, ww.work_end) - GREATEST(eu.start_timestamp, ww.work_start)
            ))
        ) AS overlap_seconds
    FROM event_usage eu
    JOIN working_windows ww
        ON eu.start_timestamp < ww.work_end
       AND eu.end_timestamp > ww.work_start
)
SELECT
    learner_code,
    resource_key,
    SUM(overlap_seconds) AS total_working_hours_seconds
FROM overlap_calc
GROUP BY learner_code, resource_key
ORDER BY learner_code, resource_key

WITH match_dates AS (
  SELECT 
    id,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS match_start_time,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + INTERVAL '2 hours' AS match_end_time,
    DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) AS match_day
  FROM "match"
)
SELECT 
  m.id,
  m.match_start_time,
  m.match_end_time,
  ROUND(
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM 
      GREATEST(
        LEAST(m.match_end_time, m.match_day + INTERVAL '17 hours') 
        - GREATEST(m.match_start_time, m.match_day + INTERVAL '7 hours 30 minutes'),
        INTERVAL '0 minutes'
      )
    ) / 60
  ) AS match_duration_minutes
FROM match_dates m
WHERE EXTRACT(DOW FROM m.match_start_time) BETWEEN 1 AND 5
  AND m.match_start_time < m.match_day + INTERVAL '17 hours'
  AND m.match_end_time > m.match_day + INTERVAL '7 hours 30 minutes'

WITH school_data AS (
  SELECT
    s.cdscode AS "pk",
    CASE
      WHEN s.charter = 1 THEN 'Charter'
      WHEN s.magnet = 1 THEN 'Magnet'
      ELSE 'Regular'
    END AS "col2",
    SUBSTRING(s.county FROM 1 FOR POSITION(' ' IN s.county) - 1) AS "col3",
    TO_TIMESTAMP(TO_CHAR(s.lastupdate, 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ' ||
           LPAD(CAST(MOD(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.cdscode), 24) AS TEXT), 2, '0') || ':' ||
           LPAD(CAST(MOD(ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.cdscode) * 7, 60) AS TEXT), 2, '0'),
           'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS "col4"
  FROM schools s
  WHERE s.statustype = 'Active'
    AND s.lastupdate IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_data AS (
  SELECT
    sd."pk",
    sd."col2",
    sd."col3",
    sd."col4"
  FROM school_data sd
  WHERE sd."col4" >= TO_TIMESTAMP('2024/09/04 00:00', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
    AND sd."col4" < TO_TIMESTAMP('2024/09/04 00:05', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
)

SELECT
  fd."col2",
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT fd."col3", ', ' ORDER BY fd."col3") AS "col3",
  COUNT(fd."pk") AS "record_count"
FROM filtered_data fd
GROUP BY fd."col2"
ORDER BY "record_count" DESC

WITH player_data AS (
    SELECT
        p.player_api_id AS player_id,
        'name' AS attribute_type,
        p.player_name AS attribute_value
    FROM player p
    WHERE p.player_api_id IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        pa.player_api_id AS player_id,
        'rating' AS attribute_type,
        CAST(pa.overall_rating AS TEXT) AS attribute_value
    FROM player_attributes pa
    WHERE pa.date = (
        SELECT MAX(date)
        FROM player_attributes
        WHERE player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        pa.player_api_id AS player_id,
        'foot' AS attribute_type,
        pa.preferred_foot AS attribute_value
    FROM player_attributes pa
    WHERE pa.date = (
        SELECT MAX(date)
        FROM player_attributes
        WHERE player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    )
)
SELECT
    player_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'name' THEN attribute_value END) AS name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END) AS rating,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'foot' THEN attribute_value END) AS preferred_foot
FROM player_data
GROUP BY player_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT attribute_type) = 3
ORDER BY CAST(
    COALESCE(MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END), '0')
    AS NUMERIC) DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH ordered_events AS (
    SELECT
        event_id,
        notes
    FROM event
),
filled AS (
    SELECT
        e.event_id,
        e.notes,
        CASE
            WHEN e.notes IS NULL THEN (
                SELECT e2.notes
                FROM event e2
                WHERE e2.event_id > e.event_id
                  AND e2.notes IS NOT NULL
                ORDER BY e2.event_id ASC
                LIMIT 1
            )
            ELSE e.notes
        END AS imputed_notes
    FROM event e
)

FROM filled
ORDER BY event_id

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        match_api_id,
        date,
        TO_CHAR(CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS match_day,
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP)) +
        EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM CAST(date AS TIMESTAMP)) / 60.0 AS hour_of_day
    FROM "match"
),
with_targets AS (
    SELECT
        mt.match_api_id,
        mt.date,
        mt.match_day,
        mt.hour_of_day,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance
    FROM match_times mt
    CROSS JOIN (
        SELECT 8 AS target_hour
        UNION ALL
        SELECT 20 AS target_hour
    ) tt
),
ranked AS (
    SELECT
        match_api_id,
        date,
        match_day,
        time_period,
        target_hour,
        time_distance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY match_day, target_hour
            ORDER BY time_distance, match_api_id
        ) AS rn
    FROM with_targets
)
SELECT
    match_day,
    MAX(CASE WHEN time_period = 'morning' THEN match_api_id END) AS closest_to_8am_match_api_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN time_period = 'evening' THEN match_api_id END) AS closest_to_8pm_match_api_id
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY match_day
ORDER BY match_day

SELECT
    "m"."id",
    "t"."team_api_id",
    "m"."home_team_api_id",
    "m"."away_team_api_id",
    "m"."home_team_goal",
    "m"."away_team_goal",
    SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
            THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
            ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
        END
    ) OVER (
        PARTITION BY "t"."team_api_id"
        ORDER BY "m"."date" NULLS FIRST, "m"."id" NULLS FIRST
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS "goal_difference"
FROM match AS "m"
INNER JOIN team AS "t"
    ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
    OR "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
ORDER BY "t"."team_api_id" NULLS FIRST, "m"."date" NULLS FIRST, "m"."id" NULLS FIRST

WITH RECURSIVE "atom_hierarchy" AS (
    SELECT 
        "atom_id", 
        "atom_id2", 
        "bond_id", 
        1 AS "level",
        ARRAY["atom_id", "atom_id2"] AS "visited"
    FROM connected 
    WHERE "atom_id" = 'TR007_8'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        c."atom_id", 
        c."atom_id2", 
        c."bond_id", 
        ah."level" + 1,
        ah."visited" || c."atom_id2"
    FROM connected AS c
    JOIN atom_hierarchy AS ah ON c."atom_id" = ah."atom_id2"
    WHERE c."atom_id2" <> ALL(ah."visited")
)

FROM atom_hierarchy
ORDER BY "level" NULLS FIRST, "atom_id" NULLS FIRST

WITH DAILY_REVENUE AS (
    SELECT date, SUM(amount) AS TotalAmount
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY date
    ORDER BY date ASC NULLS FIRST
),
MOVING_AVG AS (
    SELECT
        date,
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC NULLS FIRST ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) = 3
            THEN SUM(TotalAmount) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC NULLS FIRST ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS TotalAmount,
        CASE
            WHEN COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC NULLS FIRST ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) = 3
            THEN CAST(AVG(TotalAmount) OVER (ORDER BY date ASC NULLS FIRST ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS DECIMAL(10, 2))
            ELSE NULL
        END AS AverageAmount
    FROM daily_revenue
)
SELECT * FROM moving_avg

SELECT
    COALESCE(bond_type, 'TOTAL') AS bond_type,
    COUNT(*) AS bond_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bond WHERE bond_id = 'TR000_1_2') AS specific_bond_TR000_1_2_count
FROM bond
GROUP BY ROLLUP(bond_type)
ORDER BY GROUPING(bond_type), bond_type

WITH RECURSIVE
leaves AS (
    SELECT s.id FROM superhero2 s
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM superhero2 c WHERE c.parent_id = s.id)
),
colored AS (
    SELECT s.id, s.parent_id, s.color
    FROM superhero2 s
    WHERE s.id IN (SELECT id FROM leaves)

    UNION ALL

    SELECT p.id, p.parent_id,
        (SELECT CASE
            WHEN COUNT(*) = 1 THEN MAX(ch.color)
            WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT ch.color) = 1 THEN MAX(ch.color)
            ELSE 'gray'
        END
        FROM colored ch WHERE ch.parent_id = p.id) AS color
    FROM superhero2 p
    WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM colored ch WHERE ch.parent_id = p.id)
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM superhero2 sib
          WHERE sib.parent_id = p.id
            AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM colored ch2 WHERE ch2.id = sib.id)
      )
)
UPDATE superhero2
SET color = colored.color
FROM colored
WHERE superhero2.id = colored.id
SELECT s.id, s.superhero_name, p.publisher_name FROM superhero s JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id WHERE s.id IN (1, 2, 3) ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN c.column_name = 'cdscode' THEN CASE WHEN a.attname IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END END) AS cdscode,
  MAX(CASE WHEN c.column_name = 'statustype' THEN CASE WHEN a.attname IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END END) AS statustype,
  MAX(CASE WHEN c.column_name = 'school' THEN CASE WHEN a.attname IS NOT NULL THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END END) AS school
FROM (
  SELECT 'cdscode' AS column_name
  UNION ALL SELECT 'statustype'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'school'
) c
LEFT JOIN pg_attribute a
  ON a.attrelid = 'schools'::regclass
  AND a.attname = c.column_name
  AND a.attnum > 0
  AND NOT a.attisdropped

SELECT header || ': ' || name AS grouped_countries
FROM (
    SELECT
        (SELECT c2.name FROM country c2 
         WHERE c2.name LIKE 'Country Group%' AND c2.id <= c1.id 
         ORDER BY c2.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS header,
        c1.id,
        c1.name
    FROM country c1
) sub
WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Country Group%'

LEFT JOIN laboratory AS l ON p.ID = l.ID
GROUP BY p.ID, p.SEX, p.Diagnosis

SELECT 
    full_name,
    CASE 
        WHEN STRPOS(full_name, ' ') = 0 THEN 0
        WHEN STRPOS(SUBSTR(full_name, STRPOS(full_name, ' ') + 1), ' ') = 0 THEN 0
        ELSE STRPOS(SUBSTR(full_name, STRPOS(full_name, ' ') + 1), ' ') + STRPOS(full_name, ' ')
    END AS second_space_position
FROM superhero
