create or replace function setup_vector_store(table_name text) returns void language plpgsql as $$
begin
  execute 'drop function if exists match_strategies(int, jsonb)';

  execute format('create table %I (
    id bigint primary key generated always as identity,
    description text,
    metadata jsonb
  )', table_name);

  execute format($f$
    create function match_strategies (
      match_count int default null,
      filter jsonb default '{}'::jsonb
    ) returns table (
      id bigint,
      description text,
      metadata jsonb,
      similarity float
    ) language plpgsql as $inner$
    begin
      return query
      select
        %1$I.id,
        %1$I.description,
        %1$I.metadata,
        1::float as similarity
      from %1$I
      where metadata @> filter
      order by %1$I.embedding <=> query_embedding
      limit match_count;
    end;
    $inner$;
  $f$, table_name);
end;
$$

SELECT a.atom_id, a.molecule_id, a.element, COUNT(c.atom_id2) AS connection_count
FROM atom a
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE a.atom_id IN ('TR000_1', 'TR000_2')
GROUP BY a.atom_id, a.molecule_id, a.element

WITH date_series AS (
    SELECT d::date AS dt
    FROM generate_series('2010-01-01'::date, '2014-12-31'::date, '1 day'::interval) AS d
),
non_working_days AS (
    SELECT dt
    FROM date_series
    WHERE
        -- Weekends
        EXTRACT(DOW FROM dt) IN (0, 6)
        OR
        -- Specific holidays: New Year's Day, Independence Day, Veterans Day, Christmas Day
        (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM dt) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM dt) = 1)
        OR (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM dt) = 7 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM dt) = 4)
        OR (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM dt) = 11 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM dt) = 11)
        OR (EXTRACT(MONTH FROM dt) = 12 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM dt) = 25)
)
SELECT
    u.id,
    u.displayname,
    u.age,
    COUNT(nwd.dt) AS non_working_day_count
FROM
    users u
LEFT JOIN non_working_days nwd
    ON nwd.dt >= u.creationdate::date
    AND nwd.dt <= u.lastaccessdate::date
GROUP BY
    u.id, u.displayname, u.age
ORDER BY
    u.id

SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT id, name, 
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY label NULLS FIRST) AS item, 
    CONCAT(label, ' (', tag1, ')') AS value 
  FROM (
    SELECT id, name, 'Colors' AS label, colors AS tag1 FROM cards WHERE id = 1
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT id, name, 'ManaCost' AS label, manacost AS tag1 FROM cards WHERE id = 1
  ) AS src
) AS src

SELECT
    m1.first_name AS member1_first_name,
    m1.last_name AS member1_last_name,
    m2.first_name AS member2_first_name,
    m2.last_name AS member2_last_name,
    MAX(e.event_date) AS last_shared_event_date
FROM attendance AS a1
JOIN attendance AS a2
    ON a1.link_to_event = a2.link_to_event
    AND a1.link_to_member < a2.link_to_member
JOIN member AS m1 ON a1.link_to_member = m1.member_id
JOIN member AS m2 ON a2.link_to_member = m2.member_id
JOIN event AS e ON a1.link_to_event = e.event_id
GROUP BY m1.member_id, m2.member_id, m1.first_name, m1.last_name, m2.first_name, m2.last_name
ORDER BY last_shared_event_date ASC NULLS FIRST
LIMIT 1

SELECT l.*
FROM laboratory l
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT id, MAX(date) AS max_date
    FROM laboratory
    GROUP BY id
) latest ON l.id = latest.id AND l.date = latest.max_date
ORDER BY l.id

WITH RECURSIVE leaf_nodes AS (
    -- Find leaf nodes (entities that are not parents of anyone)
    SELECT entityid
    FROM tree_table
    WHERE entityid NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT parentid FROM tree_table WHERE parentid IS NOT NULL)
),
HierarchyCTE AS (
    -- Base case: leaf nodes with their own emission as cumulative
    SELECT t.entityid, t.parentid, t.emission, 
           t.emission::double precision AS cumulative_emission, 
           t.pctcontribution,
           0 AS level
    FROM tree_table t
    JOIN leaf_nodes l ON t.entityid = l.entityid

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive case: move up to parent, carrying child's cumulative weighted contribution
    SELECT p.entityid, p.parentid, p.emission,
           p.emission::double precision + child_agg.weighted_child_sum AS cumulative_emission,
           p.pctcontribution,
           child_agg.max_level + 1 AS level
    FROM tree_table p
    JOIN (
        SELECT c.parentid,
               SUM(c.cumulative_emission * c.pctcontribution / 100.0) AS weighted_child_sum,
               MAX(c.level) AS max_level
        FROM HierarchyCTE c
        GROUP BY c.parentid
    ) child_agg ON p.entityid = child_agg.parentid
)
SELECT entityid, parentid, 
       MAX(cumulative_emission) AS total_emission
FROM HierarchyCTE
GROUP BY entityid, parentid
ORDER BY entityid NULLS FIRST

SELECT "element", "record"
FROM "frpm_record"
UNION ALL
SELECT
    replace(replace("element", '_lowgrade', ''), '_highgrade', '') || '_rate' AS element,
    max(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_lowgrade' THEN "record" END) /
    max(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_highgrade' THEN "record" END) AS "record"
FROM "frpm_record"
WHERE "element" LIKE '%_lowgrade' OR "element" LIKE '%_highgrade'
GROUP BY replace(replace("element", '_lowgrade', ''), '_highgrade', '')

SELECT 
    id, 
    date, 
    got,
    FIRST_VALUE(got) OVER (
        PARTITION BY id, grp 
        ORDER BY date 
        ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
    ) AS new_got
FROM (
    SELECT 
        id, 
        date, 
        got,
        COUNT(got) OVER (
            PARTITION BY id 
            ORDER BY date 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW
        ) AS grp
    FROM laboratory
) sub
ORDER BY id, date

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT 5001 AS "ID", 12 AS "ARTCRED", 7.5 AS "BIZCRED", 12 AS "HUMCRED", 14 AS "NATCRED", 11 AS "TEKCRED", 9 AS "GENCRED", TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 5001, 15, 9, 14, 16, 13, 11, TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 5002, 10.5, 6, 5, 4, 6, 3, TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT 5001 AS "ID", 'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE", TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 5001, 'BIZ', TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 5001, 'NAT', TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 5002, 'ART', TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')
)

SELECT
    G."ID",
    G."GROUPCHOICE",
    G."DATECHOICE",
    CASE
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'ART' THEN LC."ARTCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'BIZ' THEN LC."BIZCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'HUM' THEN LC."HUMCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'NAT' THEN LC."NATCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'TEK' THEN LC."TEKCRED"
        WHEN G."GROUPCHOICE" = 'GEN' THEN LC."GENCRED"
        ELSE 0
    END AS "CREDIT_VALUE"
FROM "grp_choices" G
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT
        C."ARTCRED",
        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED"
    FROM "credits" C
    WHERE C."ID" = G."ID"
      AND C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" <= G."DATECHOICE"
    ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC
    LIMIT 1
) LC ON TRUE
ORDER BY G."ID", G."DATECHOICE"

WITH tbl AS (
    SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY act_date) AS item_id, act_date
    FROM (
        VALUES
            (TO_DATE('12.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('12.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('31.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('13.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('19.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('10.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('12.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('27.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy')),
            (TO_DATE('10.04.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy'))
    ) AS v(act_date)
),
months AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        TO_CHAR(act_date, 'MON-YY') AS month_label,
        TO_CHAR(act_date, 'YYYYMM') AS month_sort
    FROM tbl
),
grid AS (
    SELECT
        m1.month_label AS activation_month,
        m1.month_sort  AS rn_1,
        m2.month_label AS act_month,
        m2.month_sort  AS rn_2
    FROM months m1
    JOIN months m2 ON m1.month_sort <= m2.month_sort
),
items_per_month AS (
    SELECT
        item_id,
        TO_CHAR(act_date, 'YYYYMM') AS month_sort
    FROM tbl
)
SELECT
    g.activation_month,
    g.act_month,
    CASE
        WHEN g.rn_1 = g.rn_2 THEN
            (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ipm.item_id)
             FROM items_per_month ipm
             WHERE ipm.month_sort = g.rn_1)
        ELSE
            (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ipm.item_id)
             FROM items_per_month ipm
             WHERE ipm.month_sort >= g.rn_1
               AND ipm.month_sort <= g.rn_2)
    END AS active_items
FROM grid g
ORDER BY g.rn_1, g.rn_2
